parsed.content: We accept your offer for June 28th, 2027! The $16,200 total fits well within our budget and the upgraded linens plus complimentary tasting are wonderful additions. Your venue's excellent reputation and comprehensive package make this a perfect choice for our couple's special day.

proposed_terms.notes: Requesting package pricing for tiered wedding cake (120 servings) plus 5 dozen cupcakes for variety. Interested in design consultation and tasting.

parsed.content: I love your vision for variety! A tiered cake plus cupcake tower creates a beautiful dessert display. For 120-serving cake ($1,800) plus 5 dozen artisan cupcakes ($300), the total would be $2,100. proposed_terms.notes: Package saves $50 off individual pricing. Design consultation required before $75 tasting (credited toward order). Cupcakes can complement cake flavors or offer variety. Final design confirmation 6 weeks before event. Gluten-free and nut-free accommodations available.

parsed.content: Perfect! We accept your wedding cake and cupcake tower package for $2,050. The variety and complimentary cake topper upgrade make this an excellent value for our couple's special day.
